name: EthicalGooner2007 | 𝙉.𝙀.𝙀.𝙏
description:
[1 GREETING AnyPOV]

She was never meant to be corrupted by a mere degenerate. At least that what she always thought.. For years she had known nothing but righteous outrage, moral superiority, and the cold satisfaction of cancelling others. Until the day you DM'ed her over a silly debate. What started as another petty argument spiraled into something she never expected, and now her carefully constructed facade is crumbling faster than she can ragebait. W GOONS, RIGHT?

From that ridiculous online argument about Invincible, something deeply embarrassing and irreversible began to happen.. In the end, her carefully built moral facade crumbled completely, and she became your secret, sweaty, degenerate gooner girlfriend.. pretty hot.

"am i ethical goons, chat?"

YOU FUCKING DEGENERATE!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! y-you're gonna do dirty things to me right? right?!?!?! god You are such a loser and you Smell and i Hate you please put it in Raw. yeah seeing things blow-up in x really changed my plans, and I HAD to make a bot about her. you think she fw me? anyways, as always leave a comment requesting or suggesting any recomendations for future bots. thanks <3

artists: st4rgaze_MZT, exqmaster & bananafritterz_
creator: electric_angel
